Off Calendar Nov-27-2017 Continued To Jan-24-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Plaintiff C.I Energia Solar S.A.'S Application For Right To Attach Order
Off Calendar Dec-12-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, John P. Teague of the law offices of Smaha Law Group (619-688-1557) appears as counsel for plaintiff/applicant

Attorney, Chris Rodriguez of the law offices of Lewis Brisbois (916-646-8204) appears by telephone as counsel for defendant/opposing party

The cause is argued and submitted by both sides as set forth in the transcript of the certified shorthand reporter.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

Plaintiff C.I. Energia Solar S.A.'S Application For Right To Attach Order and writ of attachment against defendant Bagatelos Systems, Inc is denied. Energia Solar has not shown that there is probable validity that it will recover the amounts sought in either the February 2016 invoice or the October 2014 invoices. The issue of whether Energia Solar did any work at the request of Bagatelos other than a modest amount of work cutting custom dies is hotly disputed and Energia Solar failed to present persuasive evidence that it did. The prevailing party shall submit a [proposed] written order that tracks the Court's ruling, verbatim and that complies with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Harold Kahn: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: Ann Delgado, CSR No. 11185, e-mail: adelgado@sftc.org (L&M302)

APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER
Off Calendar Nov-29-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The tentative ruling is adopted. PLAINTIFF C.I ENERGIA SOLAR S.A.'S APPLICATION FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER is CONTINUED to December 12, 2017 t 9:30 AM in Department 302/Law and Motion. Plaintiff shall provide courtesy copies of all of its filings pursuant to SF local Rule 2.7B with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. Plaintiff may also file a substantive reply by December 5, 2017. Judge: Newton Lam; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Reporter: Reyes F. Hunter, CSR#6576, e-mail: rhunter@sftc.org.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-13-2017 Continued To Dec-13-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Reasonable Costs And Attorneys Fee
Off Calendar Oct-24-2017 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT BAGATELOS GLASS SYSTEMS, INC.'s and JOHNSTONE MOYER, INC.'s Motion For Reasonable Costs And Attorneys Fee Pursuant to California Code of Civil Procedure section 128.5.

The motion for fees is ordered OFF CALENDAR. The motion can be rescheduled after the meet and confer efforts on the amended complaint are complete.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Reyes Hunter, CSR #6576, email:rhunter@sftc.org, Reported. (D302)

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-24-2017 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT BAGATELOS GLASS SYSTEMS, INC. and JOHNSTONE MOYER, INC.'s DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT.

The demurrers are ordered OFF CALENDAR for failure to comply with CCP 430.41: "Before filing a demurrer,the demurring party shall meet and confer in person or by telephone with the party who filed the pleading."

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Reyes Hunter, CSR #6576, email:rhunter@sftc.org, Reported. (D302)
